$comment: Vendored from sphere-node (spec/fragment.schema.json). Source of truth lives there. Do not edit here except to re-sync.
title: Sphere Fragment Manifest
description: Contract for a single agent-readable fragment manifest (sphere.json). This file is the source of truth shared by the node, the publish script, and any external authoring tool.

id.description: Fragment id, also the URL path segment. Format yyyy-mm-dd-title-slug.

license.description: SPDX-style or named license, e.g. CC-BY.

preview_chars.description: Number of leading characters of content.md served as a free preview for gated policies.

payment.description: Payment metadata used to build the 402 challenge. Required for paid and metered policies.

sources.description: Typed EXTERNAL provenance: the books, articles, papers, videos, datasets, and pages this fragment draws on. Optional; may be empty. External only — this is NOT the internal document a fragment was generated from (that is build lineage, not part of the contract).

relations.description: Typed edges to other fragments. Opaque to the node.
